zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lauder於1394年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安梅斯頓時，她的父親Sir John de Lawedre9歲，母親Lady Katherine Landells14歲。她與Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年3月6日在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波梅斯頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Lauder于1394年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安梅斯頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Lawedre9岁，母亲Lady Katherine Landells14岁。她与Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年3月6日在英国苏格兰艾丁波梅斯頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lauder
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

variants.name: Lawter
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lawder
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lowther
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lauderdale
meanings: English: habitational name from the valley of Lauderdale, named from Lauder + either Old Norse dalr or Old English dæl ‘valley’.

variants.name: Lowder
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lauder  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lauder was born in 1394, in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Sir John de Lawedre, was 9 and her mother, Lady Katherine Landells, was 14. She married Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 6 March 1470, in Merchiston, Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Lauder est née en 1394, à Merchiston, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Sir John de Lawedre, avait 9 ans et sa mère, Lady Katherine Landells, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1470, à Merchiston, Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Lauder 1394 in Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Lawedre 9 und ihre Mutter Lady Katherine Landells 14. Sie hat in Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. März 1470 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Merchiston, Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lauder è nata il nel 1394 nel Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John de Lawedre, aveva 9 anni e sua madre, Lady Katherine Landells, aveva 14 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 marzo 1470, nel Merchiston, Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lauderが1394年にスコットランドミドロスアンメルチストンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Lawedreは9歳，母Lady Katherine Landellsは14歳であった。イギリススコットランドでAlexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年3月6日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグメルチストンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lauder(이)가 1394년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 머치스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Lawedre(은)는 9세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Katherine Landells(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 3월 6일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h 머치스턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Lauder nasceu em 1394, em Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John de Lawedre, tinha 9 anos e sua mãe, Lady Katherine Landells, tinha 14 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1470, em Merchiston, Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lauder родилась в 1394 г. в местности мирчистон, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Lawedre было 9 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Katherine Landells, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 марта 1470 г. в местности мирчистон, эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Lauder nació en 1394, en Merchiston, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Sir John de Lawedre, tenía 9 años y su mamá, Lady Katherine Landells, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Alexander Napier 2nd of Merchiston, Lord Provost of Edinburgh en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de marzo de 1470, en Merchiston, Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
